title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese advocates for hands-on project building with Claude Code over tutorial consumption, showcasing four concrete project examples: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized website, and an internal operating system. He positions project-based learning as superior for achieving higher productivity and business outcomes.
